# Project Guidelines & User Profile

## Repository Overview

This is the **GitHub profile repository** for [@professorjoaomiguel](https://github.com/professorjoaomiguel).
The only file that matters is `README.md` — its content renders directly on the public GitHub profile page.

## Purpose & Conventions

- Showcase the profile owner's bio, institutions, courses, and contact information.
- All public content MUST be written in **Português (Brasil)**.
- Keep the README concise, elegant, and professional — avoiding generic clutter.
- Do not add build scripts, code files, or CI workflows to this repository (it is a documentation-only repo).
